evidently.launch.grouptoweight.CfnAbout: A structure containing the percentage of launch traffic to allocate to one launch group.

evidently.launch.grouptoweight.GroupName.Description: The name of the launch group. It can include up to 127 characters.

evidently.launch.grouptoweight.SplitWeig.Description: The portion of launch traffic to allocate to this launch group.  This is represented in thousandths of a percent. For example, specify 20,000 to allocate 20% of the launch audience to this launch group.
